channel.title: foraging on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in foraging on Nature Works

item.title: Forager
item.description:
What is the difference between foraging and cultivating?

I listened to an old Robin Harford’s EatWeeds podcast episode with Miles Irving (very strangely, I can’t find the episode on the website) and I am starting to put together the idea of foraging in your own forest garden. http://localhost:1313/blog/230211-forager/

item.title: Robin Harford’s Eatweeds podcast
item.description:
His podcast is rather good

I actually managed to get some gardening done after days of writing and filming. http://localhost:1313/blog/230111-eatweeds/
